name: Zhulik.exe
short_description: Feel like a trader and buy magical product cheaper to sell it with extra charge. Grow your capital in the fascinating and colorful adventures of the Rogue. Earn money by using the simple "Buy&Sell" scheme. Put money to the bank and earn more! Spend money on upgrades
detailed_description:
Experimental experience!
Feel like a trader and buy magical product cheaper to sell it with extra charge.
Grow your capital in the fascinating and colorful adventures of the Rogue.

- Earn money by using the simple "Buy&Sell" scheme.
- Put money to the bank and earn more!
- Borrow money to return more!
- Spend money on upgrades
- Hire an oracle to predict the product cost
- Earn 1 000 000 money to win!

Looking for translators: Arabic, Greek, Japanese, Norwegian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Bulgarian, Finnish, Hungarian, Korean
Look in the Game Discussions!

Languages available in the game:
  • English
  • German
  • Russian
  • Portuguese
  • Estonian
  • Ukrainian
  • Czech
  • Dutch
  • Spanish
  • Chinese (Traditional)
  • Swedish
  • Italian
  • Polish
  • French
  • Belarusian
  • Turkish
  • Portuguese-Brazil
  • Danish
